name: prompt-preflight
description: Catch underspecified requests before they become expensive model turns.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify vague requests before model work begins.
interface.longDescription: Prompt Preflight runs locally before a prompt reaches Codex. It pauses costly, underspecified work and asks up to three targeted questions, while letting clear requests and conversational follow-ups pass through.
defaultPrompt: Check this prompt before I send it.
Explain why this request is ambiguous.
Help me turn this idea into an actionable prompt.
